typical_questions: What should we charge for this product?
How price sensitive are our customers?
decision_frameworks.research_objective: Understand customer willingness to pay and feature valuation to optimize pricing strategy
decision_frameworks.rationale: Conjoint reveals feature value and price elasticity; MaxDiff prioritizes features; A/B testing validates price points in market

typical_questions: Which features should we build first?
decision_frameworks.research_objective: Prioritize product features based on customer importance and value
decision_frameworks.rationale: MaxDiff forces trade-offs to reveal true priorities; Conjoint quantifies feature value; Surveys provide directional input

typical_questions: How do we compare to competitors?
decision_frameworks.research_objective: Measure and improve customer satisfaction across touchpoints and segments
decision_frameworks.rationale: CSAT measures satisfaction; NPS predicts loyalty; CES identifies friction; Text analytics reveals root causes

typical_questions: How well is our brand known?
What do people think of our brand?
How do we compare to competitors?
decision_frameworks.research_objective: Assess brand awareness, perception, and competitive positioning
decision_frameworks.rationale: Brand tracking monitors metrics over time; Surveys capture perceptions; Segmentation reveals different audience views

typical_questions: What segments should we focus on?
What personas should guide our strategy?
decision_frameworks.research_objective: Identify and profile distinct customer segments for targeted strategies
decision_frameworks.rationale: Segmentation analysis identifies groups; Surveys profile characteristics; Conjoint reveals segment-specific preferences

decision_frameworks.research_objective: Identify and fix customer experience pain points across the journey
decision_frameworks.rationale: Journey mapping shows end-to-end experience; CES finds friction; CSAT measures touchpoint quality; Text analytics explains issues

decision_frameworks.research_objective: Validate product-market fit and optimize go-to-market strategy
decision_frameworks.rationale: Surveys validate demand; Conjoint optimizes configuration; Segmentation identifies target; A/B tests messages

typical_questions: How do we compare to competitors?
decision_frameworks.research_objective: Understand competitive landscape and positioning opportunities
decision_frameworks.rationale: Surveys capture comparative perceptions; Brand tracking shows relative position; Conjoint reveals competitive strengths

decision_frameworks.research_objective: Optimize messaging and positioning for target audience
decision_frameworks.rationale: A/B testing provides direct comparison; MaxDiff prioritizes messages; Surveys assess comprehension and appeal

typical_questions: Who is at risk of churning?
decision_frameworks.research_objective: Measure and improve customer loyalty and retention
decision_frameworks.rationale: NPS predicts loyalty and churn; CSAT shows satisfaction; CES identifies friction; Surveys reveal drivers

typical_questions: What's the demand for this product?
decision_frameworks.research_objective: Estimate market size and demand for products or services
decision_frameworks.rationale: Surveys gauge purchase intent and behavior; Segmentation sizes target segments

decision_frameworks.research_objective: Optimize user experience and interface design
decision_frameworks.rationale: A/B testing validates design choices; CES measures ease of use; Surveys capture user feedback
